message.content:
@startuml
participant "user" as User
participant "FindWorkbookUI" as FindWorkbookUI
participant "UIController" as UIController
participant "FindWorkbooksController" as FindWorkbooksController
participant "StartWorkbooksSearch" as StartWorkbooksSearch
participant "fw : FindWorkbooks" as FindWorkbooks
participant "Paths" as Paths
participant "Files" as Files
participant "Cleansheets" as Cleansheets

User ->> FindWorkbookUI : startWorkbooksSearch()

alt [adicionar]
    loop [todas as adicoes]
        FindWorkbookUI ->> FindWorkbooksController : add(path)
        FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : create()
        FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : start()
        FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : run()
        FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : create()
        FindWorkbooksController ->> Paths : p : get()
        FindWorkbooksController ->> Files : walkFileTree(p, fw)
    end
    loop [todas as remocoes]
        FindWorkbookUI ->> FindWorkbooksController : remover(path)
        FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : create()
    end
end

FindWorkbookUI ->> FindWorkbooksController : startWorkbooksSearch()

loop [todas as paths]
    FindWorkbookUI ->> FindWorkbooksController : create(path, WorkbooksFoundList)
    FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : create()
    FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : start()
    FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : run()
    FindWorkbooksController ->> FindWorkbooksController : create()
    FindWorkbooksController ->> Paths : p : get()
    FindWorkbooksController ->> Files : walkFileTree(p, fw)
end

User ->> FindWorkbookUI : openFoundWorkbook()

FindWorkbookUI ->> UIController : app : getApp()
note right of FindWorkbookUI
    f represents a file that is created when the user selects a workbook to open from the list of found workbooks
end note

FindWorkbookUI ->> UIController : w : getWorkbook(f)
FindWorkbookUI ->> Cleansheets : setActiveWorkbook(w)

@enduml
